calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Terminate Testamentary Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Terminate Testamentary Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Continued To Mar-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Paolini Mori for Trustee.

Ms. Mori stated that according to San Francisco the will was sent to Contra Costa, that she believes the will has been received by Contra Costa, that hopefully it will be approved on February 13, 2020 and that she will amend the petition to terminate the trust. The Court informed Ms. Mori that it will not order distribution and that it will only appoint a Successor Trustee. The Petition to Appoint Successor, etc. is continued to March 16, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia P. Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Terminate Testamentary Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Continued To Jan-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anne Paolini-Mori for Giovanna Jackson.

Ms. Paolini-Mori stated there is a hearing on November 19th in Contra Costa County, that the will is not admitted, she has filed an ex parte petition to transfer the will (PDW-19-059896) to Contra Costa County, and she will file an amended petition with the court. The Court notes it cannot appoint a successor trustee until after the will is admitted and need to wait until after the Contra Costa County hearing. Ms. Paolini-Mori stated her concern of this being testamentary trust needing a court order to terminate and also needing a court order to transfer funds.

The petition to appoint successor trustee and to terminate testamentary trust on waiver of account is continued to January 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Terminate Testamentary Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Sep-09-2019 Continued To Oct-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee And To Terminate Testamentary Trust On Waiver Of Account
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Continued To Sep-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anne Paolini for Giovanna Jackson.

The Court stated that it sees that all Ms. Paolini really needs and can get from the Court is appointment of a Successor Trustee and that it requires admitting the will into probate. Ms. Paolini stated that the language in the trust says "may be appointed". The Court noted that it says "by an admitted will". Ms. Paolini stated that there is an issue with squatters in the property that is located in Vallejo and that she will have to come in ex parte. The Petition to Appoint Successro Trustee, etc. is continued to September 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
